data.answer: No, this is not a breach. The Leverage Ratio of 3.606x is below the §6.6A threshold of 3.75x for the test quarter 2014Q2, providing headroom of +0.144x [7][10].

raw: {"answer": "No, this is not a breach. The Leverage Ratio of 3.606x is below the §6.6A threshold of 3.75x for the test quarter 2014Q2, providing headroom of +0.144x [7][10]."}
